title: osmelia zenkeri
intro: Osmelia zenkeri, also known as the African osmelia, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as having antimalarial and anthelmintic properties. Osmelia zenkeri can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or extract, which is often used to treat various health issues, including fever, malaria, and parasitic infections.
